name: Date, Goat Cheese and Mesclun Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups mesclun (mixed baby greens, rinsed and spun dry)
3/4 pound dried dates (preferably Medjool), pitted and cut into thin stripes
6 ounces soft goat cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the vinegar, soy sauce, freshly ground pepper, and salt to taste. Gradually add the olive oil in a stream while continuously whisking until emulsified.
2. The vinaigrette may be made up to 1 day ahead and chilled, covered. Bring it to room temperature before serving.
3. In a bowl, toss the mesclun with the vinaigrette.
4. Divide the salad among 8 salad plates.
5. Top each salad with dates and goat cheese.
